issue_title: fix(email-list): show recipient in Sent and Drafts folders
issue_body_preview:
## Problem

When viewing the **Sent** or **Drafts** mailbox, every email in the list displays the sender name (`email.from[0]`) — which is always the logged-in user — instead of the recipient. This makes the list visually useless: every row shows the same name.

### Reproduction
1. Log in with any a
test_description_zh: 登录邮箱账户后，分别进入「已发送」和「草稿箱」文件夹，查看邮件列表中每封邮件显示的联系人名称。
expected_result_zh: 在「已发送」和「草稿箱」文件夹的邮件列表中，每封邮件应显示收件人的名称，而非当前登录用户（发件人）的名称，不同邮件应能区分不同的收件人。
